name: Capital O 92096 Kuala Ulee Lheue Residence Syariah

reviews.originalComment: Dgn harga 180an ribu sangat worth it menginap di hotel ini 😍 kamar luas, tempat tidur besar, kamar mandi bersih (walau ada bbrp bagian yg sudah agak rusak) tp tdk masalah. Parkir luas, lobby bersih. Overall nyaman bgt. Bakal balik lg nginap disini utk staycation bareng family ♥️
reviews.reviewComments: With a price of around 180 thousand, staying at this hotel is very worth it 😍 the room is spacious, the bed is large, the bathroom is clean (although there are a few parts that are a bit worn) but it's not a problem. The parking is spacious, the lobby is clean. Overall, very comfortable. I will definitely return to stay here for a staycation with family ♥️

reviews.reviewPositives: The location was good, plus the room did have basic things that I expected (bed, shower, table)
reviews.reviewNegatives: I think it was a person at the reception desk who was watching videos and laughing all night long. The sound insulation is not good so you can hear everything and it disturbed my sleep.

reviews.originalComment:
Untuk keseluruhan pelayanan, fasilitas dll Good.
Di sekitar Hotel juga tersedia tempat nongki dll.
Semoga makin sukses, aamiin.
reviews.reviewComments: Overall, the service, facilities, etc. are good. There are also hangout spots around the hotel. Wishing you more success, amen.

reviews.reviewTitle: Its ok...just need to do a little cleaning
reviews.reviewPositives: Easy to find place to eat.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The room floor need to mob..the glasses need.to clean. The toilet bawl need to clean.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman,bersih dan juga staffnya baik²dan ramah² lokasinya juga strategis mau kemana mana dekat
reviews.reviewComments: The place is comfortable, clean, and the staff are nice and friendly; the location is also strategic and close to everywhere.

reviews.reviewPositives: It's clean and worthy the money. No much to complain.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No lift or elevator for 2nd floor. Not adolescents friendly. No hanger in wardrobes. No heat water at the time I stayed.

reviews.originalComment: Bersih, Nyaman, cocok banget utk harga yg ditawarkan.. Akan menginap kembali jika ada perjalanan ke Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Clean, comfortable, just perfect for the price offered.. Will stay again if there is a trip to Banda Aceh.

reviews.reviewPositives: Nada.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Sitio nefasto. Para empezar me enviaron un mensaje a las 2 de la tarde conforme no me había presentado y me iban a cobrar la reserva. Les envié un mensaje comentando que llegaríamos a las 18 y al llegar nos habían comentado que nuestra reserva se había cancelado y que no parecía en el sistema pero nos la habían cobrado ya, si queríamos hospedarnos teníamos que hacer otra reserva y pagar otra vez. Encima el precio era el doble de caro.. Y nos fuimos. Luego nos comentaron unos locales que seguramente habían vendido nuestra habitación a otra persona. Sinceramente no vengáis aquí.. El staff pésimo..

reviews.originalComment: Mulai dari fasilitas dan letaknya yg strategis bakal jadi penginapan tujuan kalau balik ke banda aceh lagi
reviews.reviewComments: Starting from the facilities and its strategic location, it will be a preferred accommodation when returning to Banda Aceh again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lo que más nos gustó es que solo nos alojamos un día
reviews.reviewNegatives:
El recepcionista es un impresentable. Llegamos a las 23:00 y cuando entramos a la habitación el aire acondicionado no funcionaba como debía y no se podía regular. Se lo decimos al chico de recepción y se empieza a reir y nos dice que si no nos gusta que cancelemos. Esa fue su solución.
Pone que hay WiFi, pero solo es en la recepción. Si la habitación está cerca, suerte de que llegue algo

reviews.originalComment: Dgn harga 180an ribu sangat worth it menginap di hotel ini 😍 kamar luas, tempat tidur besar, kamar mandi bersih (walau ada bbrp bagian yg sudah agak rusak) tp tdk masalah. Parkir luas, lobby bersih. Overall nyaman bgt. Bakal balik lg nginap disini utk staycation bareng family ♥️
reviews.reviewComments: With a price of around 180 thousand, staying at this hotel is very worth it 😍 the room is spacious, the bed is large, the bathroom is clean (although there are a few parts that are a bit worn) but it's not a problem. The parking is spacious, the lobby is clean. Overall, very comfortable. I will definitely return to stay here for a staycation with family ♥️

reviews.reviewPositives: The location was good, plus the room did have basic things that I expected (bed, shower, table)
reviews.reviewNegatives: I think it was a person at the reception desk who was watching videos and laughing all night long. The sound insulation is not good so you can hear everything and it disturbed my sleep.

reviews.originalComment:
Untuk keseluruhan pelayanan, fasilitas dll Good.
Di sekitar Hotel juga tersedia tempat nongki dll.
Semoga makin sukses, aamiin.
reviews.reviewComments: Overall, the service, facilities, etc. are good. There are also hangout spots around the hotel. Wishing you more success, amen.

reviews.reviewTitle: Its ok...just need to do a little cleaning
reviews.reviewPositives: Easy to find place to eat.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The room floor need to mob..the glasses need.to clean. The toilet bawl need to clean.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman,bersih dan juga staffnya baik²dan ramah² lokasinya juga strategis mau kemana mana dekat
reviews.reviewComments: The place is comfortable, clean, and the staff are nice and friendly; the location is also strategic and close to everywhere.

reviews.reviewPositives: It's clean and worthy the money. No much to complain.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No lift or elevator for 2nd floor. Not adolescents friendly. No hanger in wardrobes. No heat water at the time I stayed.

reviews.originalComment: Bersih, Nyaman, cocok banget utk harga yg ditawarkan.. Akan menginap kembali jika ada perjalanan ke Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Clean, comfortable, just perfect for the price offered.. Will stay again if there is a trip to Banda Aceh.

reviews.reviewPositives: Nada.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Sitio nefasto. Para empezar me enviaron un mensaje a las 2 de la tarde conforme no me había presentado y me iban a cobrar la reserva. Les envié un mensaje comentando que llegaríamos a las 18 y al llegar nos habían comentado que nuestra reserva se había cancelado y que no parecía en el sistema pero nos la habían cobrado ya, si queríamos hospedarnos teníamos que hacer otra reserva y pagar otra vez. Encima el precio era el doble de caro.. Y nos fuimos. Luego nos comentaron unos locales que seguramente habían vendido nuestra habitación a otra persona. Sinceramente no vengáis aquí.. El staff pésimo..

reviews.originalComment: Mulai dari fasilitas dan letaknya yg strategis bakal jadi penginapan tujuan kalau balik ke banda aceh lagi
reviews.reviewComments: Starting from the facilities and its strategic location, it will be a preferred accommodation when returning to Banda Aceh again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lo que más nos gustó es que solo nos alojamos un día
reviews.reviewNegatives:
El recepcionista es un impresentable. Llegamos a las 23:00 y cuando entramos a la habitación el aire acondicionado no funcionaba como debía y no se podía regular. Se lo decimos al chico de recepción y se empieza a reir y nos dice que si no nos gusta que cancelemos. Esa fue su solución.
Pone que hay WiFi, pero solo es en la recepción. Si la habitación está cerca, suerte de que llegue algo

reviews.originalComment:
Tempatnya aman dan nyaman.
Ke kota sangat dekat dan juga mudah di jangkau. Sangat cocok untuk menikmati liburan. Krn gak bising.
reviews.reviewComments: The place is safe and comfortable. It is very close to the city and also easy to reach. It is very suitable for enjoying a vacation because it is quiet.

reviews.reviewPositives: L’emplacement de l’hôtel était parfait : à quelques minutes du port pour prendre le bateau vers Sabang et situé dans un quartier vivant, avec de nombreux restaurants locaux et populaires à proximité. Très pratique pour se balader et profiter de l’ambiance sans avoir besoin de transport.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Le sol de la chambre était bien propre, mais les étagères en hauteur et les surfaces en hauteur étaient très poussiéreuses, comme si elles n’étaient jamais nettoyées. On a eu l’impression que la personne qui faisait le ménage n’était pas assez grande pour y accéder. Par ailleurs, la télécommande de la climatisation ne fonctionnait pas, donc impossible de régler la température.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel sangat rekomendasi buat liburan, tempat sangat startegis dekat mesjid raya Baiturrahman dan dekat pelabuhan Ulee lheu, cari makanan di sekitaran bnyak yg jualan. Tempat parkir luas cocok yg bawak mobil.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is highly recommended for vacations, it's very strategically located near the Great Mosque of Baiturrahman and close to the Ulee Lheue port, with many food options available nearby. The parking area is spacious, suitable for those who bring cars.

reviews.reviewPositives: Belle chambre avec eau chaude et air conditionné
reviews.reviewNegatives:
La propreté laisse à désirer. Literie et serviette de toilette tachées. Pas de savon, shampooing ni papier toilette. 
Le personnel ne parlant pas anglais, difficile de se faire comprendre.

reviews.originalComment: Alhamdulillah pelayanan nya baik sekali untuk pemula seperti saya.. resepsionis nya ramah dan mencari jalan keluar buat saya yang salah pemilihan tanggal booking..makasih dek Anizar..smoga sukses
reviews.reviewComments: Alhamdulillah, the service is very good for beginners like me.. the receptionist is friendly and helped me find a solution for my wrong booking date.. thank you, Anizar.. I wish you success.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Hôtel très correct pour le prix. 
Le plus est le personnel qui est charmant, à l'écoute, souriant. 
J'ai beaucoup apprécié la bonbonne d'eau à disposition pour faire son thé (eau chaude ou froide) 
Chambre jolie et propre. 
Très bon emplacement près du port pour pulauweh.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Un peu bruyant (nous avons eu de la chance que ce soit la basse saison) 
Bon à savoir à Banda aceh : Si un couple veut dormir dans la même chambre, il faut avoir un certificat de mariage et  une photos de mariage.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan staf sangat memuaskan, Fasilitas bagus, parkiran disediakan air untuk cuci mobil. Staf nya ramah, water heater tersedia.. Menurut saya dgn harga dibawah 200k, fasilitas yg didapat diatas ekspektasi.. Insha Allah kalau ke banda akan menginap dsini lgi. 👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: The staff service is very satisfactory, the facilities are good, and there is water provided in the parking area for washing cars. The staff is friendly, and there is a water heater available. In my opinion, with a price under 200k, the facilities received are above expectations. God willing, if I go to Banda, I will stay here again. 👍👍👍

reviews.reviewTitle: Quartier immonde, absence de fenêtre et taxes coûteuses à la réception.
reviews.reviewPositives: Quartier très sale et insalubre. Chambre sans fenêtre. Un supplément très inattendu à payer sur place (signalement à Booking). Pas de serviette. Nous déconseillons ce lieu.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Quartier très sale et insalubre. Chambre sans fenêtre. Un supplément très inattendu à payer sur place (signalement à Booking). Pas de serviette. Nous déconseillons ce lieu.

reviews.originalComment: Baru pertama di sini tapi Alhamdulillah untuk sambutan dan service nya bagus , untuk deposit awal akan dikembalikan selepas check out
reviews.reviewComments: This is my first time here but thank God for the good reception and service, the initial deposit will be refunded after check-out.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lit confortable, eau chaude, chambre claire et propre.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Linges  usés , pas de savon ni de papier toilette dans la salle de bain.
Hotel 3☆..

reviews.reviewComments:
kalau betul nak jimat boleh stay sini, bilik ok cuma kali kedua saya checkin sini towel xada. untuk pasangan perlu pamerkan sijil nikah atau bukti nikah if not kena duduk bilik asing2 sbb sini sgt  patuh syariah.. 


lokasi bagus, di sekitar ada byk kedai makan dan mart juga.. boleh jalan kaki ke Masjid Raya dan pekan Atjeh untuk beli buah tangan.. apa pun bagus smuanya

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Grosse barrière de la langue, si vous n'êtes pas Indonésien. Quand on arrive on nous dit que la chambre n'est pas prête pour ensuite revenir a 14h et qu'on nous dise non pour dormir dans la même chambre car nous sommes pas mariés.
Alors attention au Backpackers en passage a Banda Aceh non mariés !

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman, fasilitas lengkap. Check in tidak ada biaya tambahan. Deposit 100 ribu pas check out dikembalikan. Kami check in pukul 14:00 wib sesuai aturan, namun pas nyampe delay 30 menit 😁 krn kamar belum siap. semoga kedepannya ada perubahan.
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable, complete facilities. Check-in has no additional fees. A deposit of 100 thousand will be refunded upon check-out. We checked in at 14:00 WIB as per the rules, but upon arrival, there was a 30-minute delay 😁 because the room was not ready. I hope there will be improvements in the future.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lage okay und ruhig
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Kein Fahrstuhl, ich hatte keine Hilfe beim Gepäck ins 1. OG tragen 

Das eine Bett war sehr durchgelegen/ Hängematte und das Bettzeug sah nicht sauber aus- eher als wenn es schon verwendet wurde. 
Das Bettlaken war sehr rauh und hatte viele „pilling“ drauf. 

Die Air condition ging nur an oder aus, keine Temperatur Einstellung 
Es war auch im Bad nicht sehr sauber.
Hier würde ich nicht mehr gern übernachten wollen.
Das Personal spricht kein Englisch

reviews.reviewTitle: Best Budget Hotel in Banda Aceh.
reviews.reviewComments:
The Best Budget Hotel in Banda Aceh.
I stayed 2 weeks in this Hotel.
The Hotel is nice clean and good value for Money.
Also the staff working at this Hotel are very friendly and helpful and they even let me leave one of my Luggage at the Hotel while I went to Sabang for a Week so I’m grateful for that. 
I wish I could give more than 5 stars. 
To the Hotel Staff thank you and see you next time :-)

reviews.reviewPositives: Günstig und gute Lage relativ groß und nicht zu heruntergekommen und AC.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Muffiger Geruch und kein Fenster. Im Bad keine Seife und der Klodeckel ist abgefallen. Dreckiges Bettzeug und Handtücher.

reviews.reviewComments: Well manage hotel, staff is very helpfull & friendly. Location is strategic if you plan for a night stop before taking early ferry to Sabang Island. A lot of local restaurants & convenient store within walking distance. Recommended.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lo staff è molto carino e disponibile
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Le foto su Booking non corrispondevano alla realtà.
Non c erano gli asciugamani, il sapone e neanche la carta igienica!
La pulizia lasciava un po’ a desiderare, molta polvere.

reviews.reviewComments: Easy to get food. A lot of restaurant near the hotel.. Affordable and comfortable. Have tv.

reviews.reviewPositives: Prima hotel voor korte tussenstop richting Sabang.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Geen ramen in onze kamers. Een van de kamers rook niet fris.

reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya bersih, air panas, AC & TV nyala, dapat handuk juga. Sesuai dengan fotonya. Nyaman sekali, resepsionisnya juga ramah. Tidak ada biaya tambahan apapun, hanya deposit yg akan dikembalikan di akhir. Jalan sedikit banyak sekali orang2 berjualan, lokasinya strategis dekat kemana2. Recommended dgn harganya 👍👍👍

reviews.reviewPositives: Kamarnya sangat bersih dan nyaman dengan harga segitu.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Hampir tidak ada

reviews.reviewComments: I stayed for only one day it is very close to ferry terminal . Very near to museums and grandmosque

reviews.reviewPositives:
kamar nya rapi ,bersih dan wangi
kamar mandi nya sangat bersih
reviews.reviewNegatives: tidak ada sarapan

reviews.reviewTitle: Great Stay, good value for money
reviews.reviewComments: Great Stay, good value for money. Okay cleanliness, let our bed sheets change because they seemed to be not clean. But the new ones where also having stains, but where washed.

reviews.reviewPositives: Hampir keseluruhan bagus, hotel masih terkesan baru, nyaman, dingin, bersih.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Tidak ada ammenities, terpaksa beli dulu ke minimarket.
Tidak ada air mineral dalam kamar namun disediakan dispenser
Tidak disediakan sarapan, namun di sekitar banyak yg jual sarapan. 
Dan terakhir tolong harganya di update dong. Sy sudah bayar ke booking.com namun pas sampai sy dikenakan biaya tambahan yg katanya harga diaplikasi tidak sesuai.

reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya bersih, air panas, AC & TV nyala, dapat handuk juga. Sesuai dengan fotonya. Nyaman sekali, resepsionisnya juga ramah. Tidak ada biaya tambahan apapun, hanya deposit yg akan dikembalikan di akhir. Jalan sedikit banyak sekali orang2 berjualan, lokasinya strategis dekat kemana2. Recommended dgn harganya 👍👍👍

reviews.reviewPositives: Nyaman
reviews.reviewNegatives: Tidak ada

reviews.reviewComments: Nyaman, bersih, dengan harga segitu worth it banget buat aku. Minusnya banyak semut kayu dari lemari2 nya.. overall oke

reviews.reviewPositives:
Lokasi bagus, dekat sekali dengan berbagai jenis makanan.
Kamar juga bersih, AC dingin, staff ramah, quiet place, dan kamar mandi juga bersih ada air hangat nya juga.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Saya menginap di Capital OYO 92096. Dan memesan melalui aplikasi Booking.com
Harga yang tertera di Aplikasi adalah "real" untuk ukuran suite (est Rp. 221.000) - Kamar suite on the spot di hotel Rp. 350.000 ya.
Namun setibanya di hotel, staff menyampaikan bahwa harga yang dibayarkan tidak sesuai dengan perjanjian antara akomodasi dan Aplikasi Booking.com. Sehingga saya diwajibkan membayar tambahan biaya lagi senilai Rp. 29.000.

Saya ok sih. tapi seharusnya Pihak akomodasi melakukan review dengan Booking.com apabila tidak sesuai kesepakatan. jangan membebankan lagi saat melakukan check in. 

- Tidak mendapatkan Air mineral dikamar (Padahal kan kamar suite). Dan disarankan refill dari dispenser yg dilobby namun tidak ada cup/gelas tersedia
- Tidak mendapatkan Amenities (Sabun, Sikat gigi, dsb)

reviews.reviewComments: okay for quick rest.. no elevator so need to use stairs, theres a few things need cleaning in certain area

reviews.reviewPositives:
Bagus
Bersih
Nyaman
Gak bau

reviews.reviewComments: kalau nak stay untuk sehari sebelum ke sabang atau lain2 temopat mmg sesuai sekali. harga berpatutan , bilik jugak kemas dan bersih.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Отель соответствует своей ценовой категории.
Рядом можно купить сим карту, есть индомарет местная сеть магазинов. Там пил кофе,чай и есть все для перекуса. От аэропорта заплатил 100000 рупий. Вообще надо договариваться с водителем на целый день и ездить по пляжам. Приложения Максим и граб работают.

reviews.reviewTitle: The staff should be replaced with someone friendlier and more responsive if possible.
reviews.originalTitle: Staf nya di ganti kalau bisa yg lebih ramah dan responsif
reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan ok hanya saja resepsionis tdk recom
reviews.reviewComments: The service is okay, but the receptionist is not recommended.

reviews.reviewPositives: Dejlig værelse
reviews.reviewNegatives: Beliggenheden. Hotellet ligger stille men tæt på en meget trafikeret gade.  Den skulle passeres.

reviews.reviewComments: Due to flight reschedule hence booked for one night stay at Banda aceh. Nearby lots of warung with walking distance. Travel during puasa month so they have prayers till late night and hotel is opposite to masjid. No issue if you are not sensitive to surrounding sound when about to sleep.

reviews.reviewPositives: La habitació és gran.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Està al cantó d'una mezquita i no paraven de cantar.

reviews.reviewTitle: Cleanliness must be more taken into consideration.
reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas lumayan lakh sesuai dngan harga, tp untuk kebersihan yg kurang.. terutama yg di kamar mandi. Padahal hotel termasuk terbilang baru... Tp kebersihan tidak dijaga
reviews.reviewComments: The facilities are reasonably good for the price, but cleanliness is lacking, especially in the bathroom. Although the hotel is relatively new, cleanliness is not maintained.

reviews.reviewPositives: Nice hotel, modern equipment, good value for the price.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Smell on chemicals..

reviews.reviewTitle: The toilet is rather blocking both legs when trying to sit down
reviews.reviewComments: The toilet seat settings is rather weird compared to other hotel as it's kind of blocking the legs and the toilet seat isn't fixed. Its loose and will move easily when you stand up after done your business.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good value for money - no frills but solid
reviews.reviewPositives: Price and location
reviews.reviewNegatives: Very basic

reviews.reviewComments: I had a terrible experience staying at this hotel. The bedsheet had visible stains, which was very unhygienic. The floor was sticky as if it had not been cleaned properly in a long time. The tap water also had a strange taste, not like normal tap water at all, which made me uncomfortable even to rinse my mouth during wudu or using it to brush my teeth. Overall, everything about this stay was disappointing. I will not be coming back.

reviews.reviewPositives: the room was clean.easy to get food..nice staff and really helpful.
reviews.reviewNegatives: nothing

reviews.reviewComments: Belum nemu yg lebih baik dari ini

reviews.reviewNegatives: standard room windowless and musty, not up to international standards

reviews.reviewComments: Very good place, central, easy to get around. Very spacious bedroom.

reviews.reviewPositives: It was close to the ferry port. Room looked ok on a first glance. Lady at the reception in the evening was kind.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Bathroom was without toilet paper, toilet seat was broken, it did not feel clean.
Bed sheets were stained, at the end i slept on my cover and did not sleep at all. Aircon is just above bed so too cold to sleep, when i switched it off the room became a furnace.
I was quite distrurbed when arriving as i was told they cannot call the taxi for me in the morning to take me to the port. Eventually sbd approached me and they told me the boy in the morning will call the taxi for me.
Is ok for the night, but I assume is more catered to locals.

reviews.reviewComments: Easy access

reviews.reviewPositives: All! 3rd times & definitely will be my fav place to stay whenever i back to Aceh

reviews.reviewComments: Great hotel

reviews.reviewNegatives: There's no elevator,  so it's convenient.

reviews.reviewComments: Nyaman, aman, dan bersih

reviews.reviewPositives: I put 3 only because the lady at the reception was very nice to me and did her best to make me feel comfortable
reviews.reviewNegatives: Don't expect to have white bedding like in the photos, where is the director of this hotel? They collect the money from customers but do nothing to improve the place, the lady was very kind and changed my sheets I could feel them they were washed but all dirty, stained with food or blood, I feel sorry for the hotel staff who do their best, it is not up to them to buy new sheets and new towels for customers. In addition, there was a very strong and unpleasant smell due to humidity and poor water evacuation

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel nya bersih dan dekat dengan kota, akses pun gampang mau kemana aja.

reviews.reviewTitle: Friendly staff, nearby supermarket & eateries, around 15 minutes to jetty by car, moderate cleanliness, worth for mo
reviews.reviewPositives: Friendly staff, nearby supermarket & eateries, around 15 minutes to jetty by car
reviews.reviewNegatives: Moderate cleanliness, no shampoo/body shower,

reviews.reviewComments: It was nice to check in at this hotel and service was great

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel is perfect for traveller with small budget .
reviews.reviewPositives: Located very close to eateries area , may it be fastfood or local cafe.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No lift

reviews.reviewComments: The price is affordable and the staff is kind

reviews.reviewPositives: A bit of quite place from the center of city, good residential area nearby
reviews.reviewNegatives: If there is a lift service, especially for senior citizen

reviews.reviewComments: Kemudahan kebersihan dan keselesaan sesuai harga

reviews.reviewPositives: Nice place, easy to find food, best staff service, clean n comfy bed n toilet
reviews.reviewNegatives: No, nothing. Everything perfect

reviews.reviewComments: Keseusian harga tidak sama dengan harga tertera di Online Travel Agent. Masalah dengan OTA tapi customer yang disuruh nambah budget kekurangan di online. Kalian mengecewakan dan memalukan hotel di Aceh. I have been arround Indonesia and world but your management hotel is worst

reviews.reviewPositives: friendly staff and simple clean.
reviews.reviewNegatives: price attractive.

reviews.reviewComments: Dispointed, harga tertera di aplikasi ternyata berbeda dengan harga waktu check-in. Kalau KSO tidak sesuai dengan kontrak jangan pakai marketing Online travel agent. Karena kalian laku kamarnya karena jual online dengan harga online. Thnks

reviews.reviewTitle: Great value for money and very helpful staff.
reviews.reviewPositives: Staff were very helpful

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel aneh yang minta bayaran tambahan
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel asked us to pay again after we already booked and paid in full through agoda. And then they said our receipt was invalid? They are the ones who gave us the receipt and they said the receipt was invalid? Demi uang berani kalian berbohong. Semoga kalian segera dapat hidayah. Kalau tidak, semoga segera dapat ganjarannya.

reviews.reviewPositives: This  is  a really  perfect  hotel. Absolutely clean, well  equipped, perfect  location  near  the  harbor and very  helpful  staff. The  price  for  what  you  get  is  anbitable

reviews.reviewComments: affordable and clean room

reviews.reviewPositives: Good location. Nice staff. Nice Room. Good wifi. A Common fridge.
reviews.reviewNegatives: No shampoo or bath soap. No toilet paper.

reviews.reviewComments:
Tingkat kenyamanan dan kebersihan cukup memuaskan.

reviews.reviewPositives: Good location. Clean. Kind staff. Common Fridge. Good WiFi

reviews.reviewPositives: AC, Hot shower, comfortable bed
reviews.reviewNegatives: Guys at the reception were kinda lazy and not really caring, like I didnt really feel a customer.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel nya bersih dan pegawai nya sangat ramah sekali 
Pelayanan nya sangat bagus 👍🏻👍🏻
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and the staff is very friendly. The service is very good. 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.reviewPositives: The staff doesn't speak English. With google translate it was possible to communicate. They were very friendly and helpful. They tried their best.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The beds had dirty sheets. We booked 2 rooms and in both rooms beds were not clean. We were too surprised to make comments about this to the staff, it was our first night in Sumatra. We should have told the staff about this.

reviews.originalComment: Harga sangat terjangkau, nyaman, bersih, fasilitas oke, recommended pokoknyaa dehh😍
reviews.reviewComments: The price is very affordable, comfortable, clean, good facilities, definitely recommended! 😍

reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is very good for a low budget price, clean, and the staff is friendly.. And it's the cheapest on the app. 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.originalComment: Harganya murah, tapi sayang booking pakai agoda kena charge 50k. Fasilitasnya standart, kamar luas dan bersih
reviews.reviewComments: The price is cheap, but unfortunately booking through Agoda incurs a 50k charge. The facilities are standard, the room is spacious and clean.

reviews.reviewTitle: Ideal for a one night stopover but…
reviews.reviewComments: Bedsheets were stained, the room was full of ants, no soap, no toilet paper. Coffee shop down the alley. Basic if you have to spend one night in Banda aceh in between flights/ferry.  Don’t expect more
Für einen kurzen Aufenthalt in Aceh ein ruhiger Ort zum schlafen! Es gibt eine warme Dusche und es ist sauber und ordentlich! Der Preis ist absolut angemessen
Für einen kurzen Aufenthalt in Aceh ein ruhiger Ort zum schlafen! Es gibt eine warme Dusche und es ist sauber und ordentlich! Der Preis ist absolut angemessen!
Very good place near stores and place to sightseeng. Good staff and close to everything

Voor een tweede keer hier geslapen. Nu naar tevredenheid. Goed ontvangen door de receptie.  We konden gelukkig de kamers upgraden tegen een redelijke vergoeding zodat we op de begane grond konden slapen  (suite) en niet met zware koffers de trappen op hoefden. Bed was uitstekend. Zo ook de douche. Een goede straal met warm water. Airco prima.  Rustige ligging in zijstraat met eigen parkeergelegenheid. Aan de hoofdstraat veel winkels en eetgelegenheden. Haven met ferry naar Sabang op ongeveer 10 minuten met de auto.

Receptiemedewerkers zijn zeer ongeïnteresseerd en niet behulpzaam. We werden uitgelachen door de 2 heren aan de receptie  omdat we 4 zware koffers van 20 kilo zelf alle trappen op moesten sjouwen omdat er geen lift is en we kamers op de bovenste etage toegewezen kregen. Er werd totaal geen hulp geboden. De heren gingen buiten op het terras zitten roken en drinken. Ook geen respect of hulp voor mijn moeder van 85 jaar die moeite heeft met traplopen. Kamers waren niet op orde. We moesten de receptie expliciet vragen om handdoeken, remote controls voor de tv en airco en om bijvullen van drinkwater.  Kamers zijn in de basis okay. Beddengoed was alleen gescheurd en met vlekken. Handdoeken ook met vlekken.  Kamer en badkamer niet echt goed schoon. Indeling badkamer niet handig. Je moet schuin op het toilet zitten, omdat de wasbak er recht voor geplaatst is. Wel goede douche en lekker warm water. Airco werkte goed. Ligging in zijstraat. Aan de hoofdstraat veel eetgelegenheden.  Basis budget slaapgelegenheid . Net goed genoeg voor een enkele overnachting.

We waren erg teleurgesteld in de receptiemedewerkers. Totaal ongeïnteresseerd en niet behulpzaam. Geen lift aanwezig. Lastig met zware koffers of mensen die wat slechter ter been zijn. Kamer en badkamer niet echt schoon. Beddengoed gescheurd en met vlekken. Handdoeken ook met vlekken. Ziet er niet fris uit. 

Douche geeft een lekkere straal en met warm water. Indeling badkamer wat vreemd waardoor je schuin op het toilet moet zitten vanwege de wasbak die dicht op het toilet geplaatst staat. Airco koelde goed.. Bed goed. Drinkwatervoorziening op de gang was leeg. Geen tissues, toiletpapier, zeep, etc. 

Ligging hotel is okay. In zijstraat. Aan de hoofdstraat  eetgelegenheden genoeg. 

Voor een enkele budget basis overnachting voldoet het net.

PIHAK HOTEL MEMINTA BIAYA TAMBAHAN DAN AGODA TIDAK BISA DI REFUND SUNGGUH MENYESAL
Uang tambahan di hilangkan

Pihak hotel selalu meminta uang pembayaran di luar aplikasi jika ingin cek in, jika tidak bayar tidak di kasi untuk masuk, ini tolong di perjelas, harus nya kalau sudah bayar di aplikasi, tidak ada lagi penagihan di lobi hotel

Trik marketing sih ini,  harga di aplikasi beda bgt 
Begitu sudah kita pesan kita bayar online, pas check in disuruh bayar lagi dong nambah dengan alibi harga di aplikasi blm di ganti terus front office ngasih surat dari OYO nya 😂 Lah saya kan pesan lewat Agoda bukan oyo
Kalo belum ubah harga yaa keselahan pihak hotel kalian dong ya
2x nginep di hari yg berbeda alesan nya sama aja harga di aplikasi salah belum di ubah, terus saya baca ulasan dari cust lain ternyata dari bulan 4 2023 harga salah 😂😂😂 Gilasih ini trik marketing nya
Gw komen karna 2x nginep 2x harga gak di update 😂😂

reviews.reviewTitle: Pemintaan biaya tambahan di hotel luar biaya aplikasi
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel lumayan baru dan lumayan bersih, tapi tidak jujur dengan harga karena berbeda dengan harga di aplikasi. Saat tiba di hotel diminta tambahan biaya Rp 64 ribu  lagi dikarenakan harga kamar mereka sebenarnya  tidak lagi sesuai dengan biaya aplikasi. Fasilitas mandi juga tidak disediakan.
Hotel yang betul hemat budget namun kualitas tidak murahan
